name: Landing Hero Page
description: Build a single-file marketing landing page (FrontendBench-style static UI). Create index.html that includes: (1) a sticky header with logo text 'NovaDesk' and nav links Features, Pricing, Docs (use ids nav-features, nav-pricing, nav-docs); (2) a hero section with id hero containing an h1, a subtitle p, and a primary CTA button id cta-primary with text matching /Get started|Start free|Try free/i; (3) a features grid id features-grid with at least 3 feature cards (.feature-card) each with h3 and p; (4) a footer id site-footer. Use modern CSS (flex/grid), dark theme, responsive layout. Prefer one index.html with embedded <style> and optional <script>, or index.html + styles.css. Do NOT use external CDNs except fonts. When done, reply FINISHED.
source: Inspired by FrontendBench L1 static pages & frontend agent rubrics (landing / marketing UI).
